name: token-budget
description: Portable, offline-first LLM token counting + prose optimization for codebases, docs, and agent skills.
comment-dependencies: gpt-tokenizer = pure-JS, offline o200k_base (covers GPT-5.x) — the shared local normalizer for all families. Claude/Gemini exact counters use raw HTTPS to their count APIs (no SDK dep). See references/tokenizers.md.
